sentence: וַיַּעַשׂ אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָרָקִיעַ וַיַּבְדֵּל בֵּין הַמַּיִם אֲשֶׁר מִתַּחַת לָרָקִיעַ וּבֵין הַמַּיִם אֲשֶׁר מֵעַל לָרָקִיעַ וַיְהִי־כֵן

grammatical-notes.וַיַּעַשׂ: Waw-consecutive + Verb 'ya-as' (Qal Imperfect 3ms). From 'asah' (to make/do). Indicates the physical execution of the command.
grammatical-notes.וַיַּבְדֵּל: Waw-consecutive + Hiphil verb. Sequential establishment of the boundary.
grammatical-notes.מִתַּחַת: Preposition 'min' (from) + 'tachat' (under). A vector marker indicating origin from the underside.
grammatical-notes.מֵעַל: Preposition 'min' (from) + 'al' (above). A vector marker indicating origin from the upper side.
grammatical-notes.וַיְהִי־כֵן: Waw-consecutive + Verb + Adverb/Adjective 'ken' (so/fixed). Signals the stabilization of the new reality.

dictionary-meaning.וַיַּעַשׂ: Then Elohim personally manufactured and accomplished — disclosing the 'Builder's Agency' of asah in contrast to the architect's bara (Rule 11).
dictionary-meaning.מִתַּחַת: Which exist precisely from beneath — disclosing the vector origin of the lower waters (Rule 29).
dictionary-meaning.מֵעַל: Which exist precisely from above — disclosing the vector origin of the upper waters (Rule 29).
dictionary-meaning.וַיְהִי־כֵן: And it was established as a fixed and stable reality — disclosing the forensic weight of 'ken' as a marker of permanence and stability (Rule 10).

עשה.reason: The context of building the physical structure of the sky requires a term that conveys creative effort and completion.

main-translation: ***Then Elohim personally manufactured and accomplished the hammered-out expanse; and He personally established the fixed boundary between the waters which exist precisely from beneath the expanse and the waters which exist precisely from above the expanse; and it was established as a fixed and stable reality.***

main-translation-explanation.Then Elohim personally manufactured and: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the 'Builder's Agency' of asah (Rule 11) as distinct from the architect's bara.
main-translation-explanation.precisely from beneath / above: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the 'min' vector markers indicating the origin and direction of the waters relative to the expanse (Rule 29).
main-translation-explanation.established as a fixed and stable realit: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the forensic weight of 'ken' as a marker of structural permanence (Rule 10).

rejected-translations.reason: Too thin; fails to disclose the structural stability and fixed nature of the result (Rule 10).
Fails to disclose the 'vector' preposition 'min' (from) which identifies the origin and direction of the waters (Rule 29).
